form.title: Request Service
form.subtitle: Tell us what happened and we will connect you with a local crew. For emergencies, calling is fastest.
form.name: Full name
form.service: What do you need help with?
form.messagePlaceholder: For example: water heater burst in the garage, about an inch of water across the floor.
form.smsConsent: I agree to receive calls and text messages about my request. Message and data rates may apply. Reply STOP to opt out.
form.successBody: Thanks. A local restoration crew will call you back shortly. If this is urgent, please call us now instead of waiting.
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong sending your request. Please try again, or call us directly.

sections.servicesTitle: Water damage services for Kent homes and businesses
sections.whyUsTitle: Why Kent homeowners call us first

service.indexIntro: Water damage moves fast and comes in many forms. Flooded basement, burst pipe, sewage backup, or storm damage, these are the services available through the local crews we connect you with across Kent, WA. Every one is available 24/7.
service.indexMetaDescription: Water damage restoration services in Kent, WA: flood cleanup, extraction, mold, sewage, storm, and burst pipes. Available 24/7. Call now.

area.indexIntro: We connect homeowners with local restoration crews across Kent and the surrounding South King County communities. Choose your area to see the water damage risks specific to where you live and how help reaches you fast.
area.indexMetaDescription: Water damage restoration across Kent, WA and nearby areas, from East Hill to Tukwila and Covington. Available 24/7. Call now for local help.

guide.indexIntro: Straight answers about water damage, written for homeowners rather than search engines. From what restoration really costs to how insurance claims work and what to do in the first hour, these guides help you make good decisions under pressure.
guide.indexMetaDescription: Plain-English guides to water damage in Kent, WA: costs, insurance claims, categories, drying time, and first steps. Call us 24/7 if you need help.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: Water damage is easier to handle with one call. Reach us any time and we will connect you with a licensed local crew serving Kent.
contact.metaDescription: Contact Kent Water Damage Pros for 24/7 water damage help in Kent, WA. Call or send the form to reach a local restoration crew fast.
